title: .NET Analyzer Rules
description: Provides a set of rules for an analyzer.

rule.title: Analyzer Rule
rule.description: A rule that is used by an analyzer to denote diagnostic issues.

id.description: The unique code used to reference a rule.

title.description: A short description of the rule.

helpUri.description: The URI which provides help documentation for the rule.

category.description: The category used to organize the rule within the set.

default.description: The default severity for the rule.

options.description: The names of options used to further customize the rule's behavior.
